alerts.title: Added: Japan Additive Limits - Unapproved additives (excluding natural flavoring agents and generally consumed items used as additives)
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Prohibited, unless MHLW specifies as unlikely to cause harm. This implies a positive list system for approved additives.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Contaminant Limits - Foreign substances
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Prohibited if likely to cause harm due to contamination or addition of foreign substances.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Contaminant Limits - Residues of agricultural chemicals, feed additives, and pharmaceutical products for animals
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Exceeding MHLW-specified quantities is prohibited. This refers to the 'Positive List System for Agricultural Chemical Residues in Food'.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Contaminant Limits - Toxic or harmful substances
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Prohibited, unless specified by MHLW as unlikely to cause harm.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Contaminant Limits - Toxic or harmful substances in apparatus, containers, and packaging
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Prohibited if likely to cause harm to human health or have a harmful effect on food/additives.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Microbiology Limits - Pathogens
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Prohibited if contaminated or suspected to be contaminated and likely to cause harm.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Additive Limits - Class II chemical preservatives (e.g., sorbic acid, benzoic acid)
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Not to be directly added during manufacturing of kueh; permitted in fillings and toppings within prescribed limits. This rule is specific to the manufacturing and use of preservatives in kuehs.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Additive Limits - Compliance with regulatory limits
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Mandatory compliance. All food businesses offering food for sale in Singapore must comply with regulatory limits on food additives.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Additive Limits - Food additives
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Must be assessed and permitted by SFA. Food additives must be assessed for safety by SFA before they can be used in food sold in Singapore.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Additive Limits - Non-permitted additives in food products
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Prohibited from import or sale. Food products containing an additive that is not permitted must not be imported or sold.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Additive Limits - Permitted food additives
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Only SFA-permitted additives allowed. Only food additives that have been assessed by SFA are permitted for use in food products sold in Singapore.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Contaminant Limits - Contaminants (incidental constituents)
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Must be within SFA’s regulatory limits. Contaminants in food sold in Singapore must be within SFA’s regulatory limits.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Contaminant Limits - Contaminants exceeding limits
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Prohibited from import or sale. Food or food products containing contaminants or incidental constituents that exceed regulatory limits must not be imported or sold.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Labelling Requirement - Declaration of ingredients and additives
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Must be declared in list of ingredients on food labels. Applies to prepacked foods for sale in Singapore.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Labelling Requirement - General labelling compliance
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Must comply with labelling requirements. Prepacked food products must comply with general labelling requirements.

alerts.title: Added: Taiwan Allergen List - Crustacean shellfish, mango, peanuts, sesame seeds, milk and goat milk, eggs, tree nuts, gluten-containing cereals, soybeans, fish
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Mandatory declaration if present as ingredient or food additive. These 10 allergens require mandatory labeling on prepackaged foods if present as an ingredient or food additive.

alerts.title: Added: Taiwan Allergen List - Sulphite (as residue sulphur dioxide)
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: 10 or more. Mandatory declaration if the residue sulphur dioxide concentration is 10 mg/kg or more.

alerts.title: Added: Thailand Labelling Requirement - Prohibited Foods
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Prohibited from production, import, or sale. A list of foods prohibited from production, import, or sale must be consulted under 'อาหารที่ห้ามผลิต นำเข้า หรือจำหน่าย'.

alerts.title: Added: United States Additive Limits - Prohibited substances
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Prohibited from use in food, as listed in FDA regulations (21 CFR Part 189). Verification required.. Substances listed as "PROHIBITED" or "PROHIBITED WITH EXCEPTIONS".

alerts.title: Added: United States Allergen List - Major Food Allergens
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Check official source. The nine major food allergens are milk, eggs, fish, Crustacean shellfish, tree nuts, peanuts, wheat, soybeans, and sesame.

alerts.title: Modified: United States Contaminant Limits - 3-Monochloropropane-1,2-Diol (3-MCPD)
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: Old: 1. New: 1. This is a Guidance Level.

alerts.title: Added: United States Contaminant Limits - Aflatoxins, total
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: 20. This is an Action Level.

alerts.title: Added: United States Contaminant Limits - Aflatoxins, total
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: 20. This is an Action Level.

alerts.title: Added: United States Contaminant Limits - Aflatoxins, total
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: 20. This is an Action Level.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - "Gluten-free" claim
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification required against FDA final rules for "gluten-free" definition and compliance requirements for fermented and hydrolyzed foods.. FDA issued a final rule defining "gluten-free" for food labeling and compliance requirements for fermented and hydrolyzed foods.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - Allergen preventive controls
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Check official source. The CGMP & PC rule (21 CFR part 117) establishes requirements for allergen preventive controls to prevent allergen cross-contact in manufacturing and packaging and to prevent undeclared allergens. Facilities must have written procedures.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - Cochineal extract and carmine
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Check official source. Must be declared on the label as they are identified as allergenic substances.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - Declaration of Major Food Allergens
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Check official source. The food source of a major food allergen must appear in parentheses following the ingredient name OR immediately after or next to the list of ingredients in a "contains" statement. Specific types of tree nuts, fish species, and Crustacean shellfish species must be declared.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - FD&C Yellow No. 5
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Check official source. Required to be identified on labels due to potential hypersensitivity reactions.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - Sulfiting agents (e.g., sodium bisulfite)
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: ≥10. Must be declared on food labels when present at or above the specified concentration.

alerts.title: Modified: China Additive Limits - Food Additives
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. New: Verification required as per GB 2760-2015. The full standard GB 2760-2015 must be consulted for specific additive types, maximum levels, and application scope.

alerts.title: Added: Codex Additive Limits - Permitted food additives
alerts.details: New: Verification required. The Codex General Standard for Food Additives (GSFA, Codex STAN 192-1995) sets forth the conditions under which permitted food additives may be used in all foods. Specific provisions are available in the searchable online database, and users are encouraged to consult the Preamble for interpretation.

alerts.title: Removed: Codex Additive Limits - Permitted food additives
alerts.details: Old: Verification required via GSFA Online Database. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: Codex Contaminant Limits - Contaminants and naturally occurring toxicants
alerts.details: New: Verification required. The Codex maximum level (ML) for a contaminant in a food commodity is the maximum concentration legally permitted. The Codex Committee on Contaminants in Food (CCCF) establishes and endorses these levels, which are detailed in the General Standard for Contaminants and Toxins in Food and Feed (CXS 193-1995).

alerts.title: Added: Codex Contaminant Limits - Mycotoxins
alerts.details: New: Verification required. A Code of Practice (CXC 78-2017) exists for the prevention and reduction of mycotoxins in spices. This document should be consulted for specific guidance.

alerts.title: Removed: Codex Contaminant Limits - Contaminants (e.g., mycotoxins, metals like arsenic, lead, mercury)
alerts.details: Old: Verification required via Codex General Standard for Contaminants and Toxins in Food and Feed (CXS 193-1995). Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: Codex Contaminant Limits - Mycotoxins in spices
alerts.details: Old: Prevention and reduction required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: European Union Additive Limits - Food additives
alerts.details: New: Verification required. The EU Additives Database provides information on approved food additives and their conditions of use, based on Annex II of Regulation (EC) No 1333/2008.

alerts.title: Removed: European Union Additive Limits - Food additives
alerts.details: Old: Verification required from Union list in Annex II of Regulation (EC) No 1333/2008. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: European Union Microbiology Limits - Foodborne bacteria (e.g., Salmonella, Listeria monocytogenes, Enterobacter sakazakii), their toxins and metabolites (e.g., staphylococcal enterotoxins, histamine)
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Commission Regulation (EC) No 2073/2005 lays down food safety criteria for relevant foodborne bacteria, their toxins and metabolites in specific foods, and also process hygiene criteria.

alerts.title: Removed: European Union Microbiology Limits - Foodborne bacteria, their toxins and metabolites (e.g., Salmonella, Listeria monocytogenes, Enterobacter sakazakii, staphylococcal enterotoxins, histamine)
alerts.details: Old: Verification required from Commission Regulation (EC) No 2073/2005. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: European Union Microbiology Limits - Listeria monocytogenes
alerts.details: Old: Compliance with food safety criteria defined in Regulation (EC) No 2073/2005, requiring shelf-life studies and sampling procedures. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: European Union Microbiology Limits - Production process hygiene
alerts.details: Old: Verification required from Commission Regulation (EC) No 2073/2005. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: European Union Microbiology Limits - Salmonella prevalence
alerts.details: Old: Verification required from Council Decision 95/410/EC, Decision 2004/235/EC, Decision 2003/644/EC, Regulation (EC) No 1688/2005, Regulation (EC) No 853/2004, and Regulation (EC) No 2160/2003. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: GCC/GSO Additive Limits - Additive declaration and limits in pre-packaged foodstuffs
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: GCC/GSO Allergen List - Allergen declaration on pre-packaged foodstuffs
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: GCC/GSO Labelling Requirement - General Halal requirements
alerts.details: New: Verification required. This regulation outlines the general requirements for food to be considered Halal, applicable to seasoning, snack, and processed foods making Halal claims.

alerts.title: Added: GCC/GSO Labelling Requirement - General labelling requirements
alerts.details: New: Verification required. This regulation outlines the general requirements for labelling of prepackaged food products, which includes seasoning and snack products.

alerts.title: Added: GCC/GSO Labelling Requirement - Mandatory shelf life periods
alerts.details: New: Verification required. This regulation specifies mandatory shelf life periods for all food products, including seasoning and snack products.

alerts.title: Removed: GCC/GSO Labelling Requirement - General labelling requirements for pre-packaged foodstuffs
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: GCC/GSO Labelling Requirement - Mandatory shelf life declaration for food products
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: GCC/GSO Labelling Requirement - Optional shelf life declaration for food products
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: GCC/GSO Salt / Sodium Limits - Salt/sodium declaration on pre-packaged foodstuffs
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: GCC Labelling Requirement - General labeling requirements for prepackaged food
alerts.details: New: Verification required as per GSO 9:2022. This technical regulation outlines the general labeling requirements for all prepackaged foodstuffs, which would include allergen declarations and warnings.

alerts.title: Added: GCC Labelling Requirement - General requirements for Halal food
alerts.details: New: Verification required as per GSO 2055-1:2015. This technical regulation outlines the general requirements for food products to be considered Halal, which may include specific ingredient, processing, and labeling rules.

alerts.title: Added: GCC Labelling Requirement - Mandatory expiration dates for food products
alerts.details: New: Verification required as per GSO 150-1:2013. This technical regulation specifies mandatory expiration dates for food products.

alerts.title: Removed: GCC Labelling Requirement - General labelling requirements
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: GCC Labelling Requirement - Mandatory expiration dates
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: GCC Labelling Requirement - Voluntary expiration dates
alerts.details: Old: Check official source. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: GCC Microbiology Limits - Microbiological limits for foodstuffs and food ingredients
alerts.details: New: Verification required as per GSO 1016:2015. This technical regulation specifies microbiological limits for foodstuffs intended for human consumption and for food ingredients used in the food industry.

alerts.title: Removed: GCC Microbiology Limits - Microbiological limits
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: India Additive Limits - Specific food additive limits
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Specific limits for food additives in seasoning, snack food, and ready-to-eat snacks must be verified against the detailed schedules within this compendium.

alerts.title: Added: India Labelling Requirement - General labelling and display requirements
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Specific labelling and display requirements for seasoning, snack food, and ready-to-eat snacks must be verified against the detailed regulations within this compendium.

alerts.title: Added: Indonesia Additive Limits - Dinitrogen Monoksida (N2O)
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Specific regulations govern the production, import, registration, and circulation of Dinitrogen Monoksida (N2O) when used as a food additive.

alerts.title: Added: Indonesia Additive Limits - General Additive Limits
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Specific additive limits for various processed foods, including seasoning and snack products, are detailed across the 281 regulations concerning 'Pangan Olahan' in the BPOM legal database.

alerts.title: Removed: Indonesia Additive Limits - All food additives
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.details: New: Verification required. Specific requirements for allergen declaration and lists for various processed foods, including seasoning and snack products, are detailed across the 281 regulations concerning 'Pangan Olahan' in the BPOM legal database.

alerts.title: Removed: Indonesia Allergen List - Allergen declaration

alerts.details: New: Verification required. Specific contaminant limits for various processed foods, including seasoning and snack products, are detailed across the 281 regulations concerning 'Pangan Olahan' in the BPOM legal database.

alerts.title: Removed: Indonesia Contaminant Limits - All contaminants
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: Indonesia Labelling Requirement - Food Categorization
alerts.details: New: Verification required. This regulation establishes the official food categorization system, which is fundamental for applying specific regulatory requirements, including additive limits and labelling rules, for all processed foods.

alerts.title: Added: Indonesia Labelling Requirement - General Labelling Requirements
alerts.details: New: Verification required. General and specific labelling requirements for various processed foods, including seasoning and snack products, are detailed across the 281 regulations concerning 'Pangan Olahan' in the BPOM legal database.

alerts.details: New: Verification required. Specific microbiology limits for various processed foods, including seasoning and snack products, are detailed across the 281 regulations concerning 'Pangan Olahan' in the BPOM legal database.

alerts.details: New: Verification required. Specific salt/sodium limits for various processed foods, including seasoning and snack products, are detailed across the 281 regulations concerning 'Pangan Olahan' in the BPOM legal database.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Additive Limits - Ingredients, production, processing, use, cooking, or preservation methods for food or additives
alerts.details: New: Verification required against MHLW established criteria/standards. Specific criteria and standards are established by the Minister of Health, Labour and Welfare. Refer to 'Specifications and Standards for Food, Food Additives, etc. Under The Food Sanitation Act' for details.
